pr.title: Fix invalid Gemini model default, inverted lab trends, error handling, and stale docs
pr.body:
## Summary

Code review of the MedBRAIN monorepo identified 3 code bugs and 1 documentation gap. This PR fixes all of them:

1. **`gemini_config.py`** — `DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL` was `"gemini-3.5-flash"` (nonexistent model). Changed to `"gemini-2.5-flash"`. Without `GEMINI_MODEL` env var set, all LLM/VLM calls would fail at runtime.
2. **`clinical.py` `_labs()`** — Episodes are sorted newest-first, but `vals[-1]` (oldest) was picked as "latest" value, inverting lab trend direction on the dashboard. Fixed to `vals[0]`.
3. **`transcribe.py`** — `save_session_endpoint` returned HTTP 200 with `{"error": ...}` on failure. Changed to raise `HTTPException(500)` for consistency with all other API endpoints.
4. **`AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md`** — Added `(default gemini-2.5-flash)` to the Backends section so the actual fallback value is documented.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Lab trends (critical):** Load a patient with multiple lab episodes in the clinical dashboard. Verify the "Latest" value shown corresponds to the most recent episode, not the oldest. This was silently wrong before.
- [ ] **Gemini model:** Confirm `GEMINI_MODEL` env var is unset, then verify LLM calls use `gemini-2.5-flash` (check logs or LangSmith traces). Previously would attempt `gemini-3.5-flash` and fail.
- [ ] **Transcribe error handling:** Trigger a failure in `POST /api/transcribe/save-session` (e.g., invalid payload) and confirm you get HTTP 500 with a `detail` field, not HTTP 200 with `{"error": ...}`.

**Recommended test plan:** Start the API (`npm run dev:api`), open the clinical dashboard, and verify lab trend values for a patient with Zep episode history. Then test the transcribe save endpoint with a deliberately bad request.

### Notes

- The upstream commit `6f8694d` already fixed the Fireworks→Gemini references in docs and the `patients.py` docstring. This PR's doc changes now only add the default model annotation.
- No CI is configured on this repo; TypeScript type-check (`tsc --noEmit`) passes locally.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/a720e4ec335e47e7847aadc76da4d99d
Requested by: @pthebesfsu-a11y
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
